Our Story

Precision Craftsmanship
at Commercial Scale

Since 1984, SMI Cabinetry has been the preferred manufacturing partner for contractors and architects across Florida. We combine advanced CNC manufacturing technology with the attention to detail that only skilled craftspeople can deliver.

Operating from a fully integrated 80,000+ square foot facility, we manage design, fabrication, finishing, and installation under one roof — ensuring complete quality control from material selection through final installation.

As a state-licensed building contractor with multi-million dollar bonding capacity, we handle commercial projects of any scale with full professional accountability.

AWI Member Licensed Contractor LEED Capable
1984
Florida's Premier Architectural Woodwork Manufacturer

CNC precision on every component. AWI-certified quality on every delivery. Our clients — GCs, architects, and developers across Florida — come back because we make their schedules ours.

Capabilities & Markets

What We Build &
Who We Build It For

Both natural wood and plastic laminate architectural millwork — custom-fabricated to specification and installed by our own certified team across six commercial sectors.

Capabilities
01
Architectural Casework

Custom commercial casework to AWI Premium, Custom, and Economy grades.

02
Wall Paneling & Wood Trim

Precision-machined systems across a wide range of species, stains, and profiles.

03
Countertops, Solid Surface, Quartz & Granites

Custom countertops and Architectural Stone elements for reception desks, nurse stations & wall coverings.

04
Custom Millwork

Bespoke architectural millwork including feature walls, custom fixtures, and specialty wood elements.

05
Plastic Laminate Products

High-performance laminate millwork for high-traffic commercial environments.

06
Design & Installation

End-to-end — scope, fabrication, and certified installation managed in house.

Markets Served
Medical Facilities
Hotels & Resorts
Stadiums & Venues
Office Buildings
Educational Facilities
Financial Institutions
Our Process

From Architectural Drawings to Installed

1
Consultation

Direct engagement to scope requirements, review drawings, and establish material specifications.

2
Design & Engineering

Shop drawings produced, reviewed, and approved before any fabrication begins.

3
Manufacturing

CNC fabrication for both Millwork and Stone Products in our 80,000 sq ft facility with in-house finishing and QA at every stage.

4
Delivery & Install

Licensed installation crews, punch-list accountability, and post-installation support.

Our Work

Selected Projects

View Project
Hotels & Resort Properties

Booth Rail & Dining Millwork

Custom curved wood wall and integrated railing, reception counter with integrated LED lighting, and full dining millwork for a large-format commercial hospitality space.

Educational Facilities

Bishop Moore — Locker Room

Custom wood locker casework with integrated hooks and shelving for a K-12 athletic facility, featuring institutional-grade durability.

View Project
Office Buildings

Corporate Conference Suite

Floor-to-ceiling wood wall paneling, custom casework, and integrated millwork for a curved executive conference suite.

View Project
Medical Facilities

Human Performance Institute — Vanity Suite

Custom vanity millwork with wood-grain laminate columns, floating solid-surface countertop, and open shelving for an athlete performance facility.

View Project
Stadiums & Event Venues

Daytona Suite Bar

Custom illuminated bar counter with laminate face panels, integrated stainless trim, and back bar casework for a premium stadium suite.

Educational Facilities

College of Medicine — Lobby

Architectural wood-wrapped columns, curved feature fascia with donor inscription, and premium entry millwork for a medical school atrium.

View Project
Educational Facilities

College of Medicine — Auditorium

Full wood wall paneling system, lecture casework, and integrated millwork for a large tiered auditorium within a healthcare education complex.

Educational Facilities

Bishop Moore — Stair & Feature Wall

Custom stair treads, wood panel accent wall with hexagonal feature inserts, and architectural millwork for a K-12 athletic center.

Credentials

Certified to the
Highest Standards

✦
AWI Certified Member
Architectural Woodwork Institute member and Quality Certification Program holder — the most stringent woodwork quality standard in North America.
✦
State Licensed Building Contractor
Florida state-licensed with multi-million dollar bonding capacity for commercial projects of any scale.
Our Mission

What We Stand For

"To provide our customers superior design solutions, quality workmanship, on-time and on-budget project completion, and direct communication to ensure exceptional client satisfaction."

From single-room fit-outs to multi-building institutional programs — every scope gets the same precision, the same direct communication, and the same team from first drawing to final punch list.
